one_line: On the MOST answer-threatening strict-#319 subset (16 hand-picked content-forks + sharpest gpqa/aime heals), re-decoded at full 6144-tok natural EOS, ZERO flips damage the score: flip_r2w_count=0. The 4 real both-commit flips are 2 W2R (spec FIXED an AR error) + 2 BENIGN (both wrong). Corroborates wirbel #682's aggregate net-neutral / symmetric-reshuffle claim.

flips_detail.note: spec correct; AR's naive-dipole C is wrong (spheroid is a higher multipole, lambda^-6)

flips_detail.topic: Substance X isotope chemistry (n=p vs N=Z heal)
compressible air-duct flow velocity + mass flow

no_commit_detail.why: AR did not emit ANSWER within 6144 tok (finish=length); spec committed. Asymmetric-commit instrument artifact, NOT a semantic flip. Leaks into the literal spec!=AR frac (the +1 over the 4 both-commit flips).
both arms hit the 6144 cap before ANSWER -- hard AIME needing >6144 tok of reasoning (#685: aime median 3783 but tail is long)

gold_provenance.gpqa_diamond: inspect_evals.gpqa.get_gpqa_diamond_dataset(shuffle_choices=False) -- canonical openaipublic CSV (the #643/#598 harness gold), choices[0]=correct; gated Idavidrein repo unreachable from this token, canonical source used instead
gold_provenance.mmlu_pro: TIGER-Lab/MMLU-Pro test split via datasets-server /search, options[answer_index]=correct
gold_provenance.letter_mapping: gold matched by TEXT to THIS prompt's option lettering (the #694 eval set shuffles option order independently of source), so gold letter is comparable to #689's extracted ANSWER letter
gold_provenance.hand_adjudication_note: explicitly avoided -- my naive dipole physics gave C for gpqa-0dbcc69ff3 but authoritative gold is B; the spec stack was right and I was wrong, which is exactly why only canonical gold is trusted

reconciliation_682.logic: #682 aggregates over ALL breaks (~128 prompts): high end-to-end retention (worst 0.957 gpqa) despite high token_break_rate (0.517) => most token-level breaks heal at the answer level with net-neutral direction (R2W ~= W2R) and ZERO new 515-gate failures. #694 is the UPPER-TAIL probe: it enriches for exactly the answer-threatening forks/heals, so its flip rate (~0.31) is far above the aggregate -- yet even here flip_r2w_count=0 and net direction favors spec (+2 W2R, 0 R2W). The enriched upper tail showing zero score damage is the strongest possible corroboration of #682's aggregate net-neutrality; no inconsistency.

caveats: TINY, deliberately NON-representative subset (16 prompts hand-picked as the worst forks/heals) -- this measures the UPPER TAIL of answer threat, not a population flip rate. The +2 W2R net is NOT a claim that spec improves accuracy; it is evidence the worst-case forks are not score-damaging.

3/16 are NO_COMMIT (all AIME) because the answer needs >6144 reasoning tokens -- an instrument limit, not a null result. 1 of these (5e99c1f8e3) inflates the literal spec!=AR frac to 0.3125 vs the both-commit 0.3077.
Single greedy decode per arm (temp=0, deterministic); no seed variance. The flip set is the specific tie-breaks of this served stack (#4 int4_g128_lmhead + BI + TRITON_ATTN).
Gold resolved only for the 4 flips (PRESERVED contribute 0 to R2W by construction). PRESERVED answer-correctness was not graded.
boundary: analysis_only: a measured flip count is a strict-#319 policy SURFACE for the human's relaxation decision, NOT a fire and does NOT relax #319. No HF Job, no submission, no served-file change, official_tps=0.
